texto: No one understands me but I am cool with that. I was different from others. I knew this from when I was young. Things that turned people off normally about violence and death did the exact opposite with me. For when I was a small boy, death always intrigued me. I loved watching things die. Watching life leave someone's eyes was an adrenaline rush.
explicacao: Citação de Jewel_louise sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “No one understands me but I am cool with that. I was different from others. I knew this from when…” articula reflexao, death, violence em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e violence.
